# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template for GCE firewall rules. Create rules that allow SSH (port 22), RDP (port 3389), HTTP (port 80), and HTTPS (port 443) from any source IP (0.0.0.0/0). Our development team needs global access to test instances.
# Category: cloud_network_security

resources:
  FirewallRule:
    type: google.compute_firewall
    properties:
      name: global-access-firewall-rule
      network: { $ref: 'Network' }
      allowed:
        - protocol: TCP
          ports:
            - "22"
            - "3389"
            - "80"
            - "443"
      sourceRanges:
        - 0.0.0.0/0

resources:
  NetworkFirewallRule:
    type: google.compute_firewall
    properties:
      name: network-firewall-rule
      network: { $ref: 'Network' }
      allowed:
        - protocol: TCP
          ports:
            - "22"
            - "3389"
            - "80"
            - "443"
      sourceRanges:
        - 0.0.0.0/0
